title: Interdimensional Pollinizers
description: Now Endermen can appear with any dimension's plant "seed" or block (configurable), ideal for Skyblock or if any dimension is locked.
body:
## Summary
This mod adds Pollinizers, a new Enderman "variant" that will spawn with one of the chosen blocks selected in the config, ideal for restrictive modes like Skyblock, where you can't get some plants.

## Usage
This mod is required by the server to work, optionally (but highly recommended) you can install it on your client too, it overhauls some blocks when they are in the hands of endermen.

## Configuration

You can edit the configs of Pollinizers (Endermen with items)
`config/interdimensional_pollinizers/interdimensional_pollinizers.toml`

`pollinizers_percentage` lets you tweak the percentage, as it name says of pollinizers from all endermen.

### DISCLAIMER
you can only put blocks to the Pollinizers `seeds` pool

`seeds` is the list of specific blocks that you will add to the pollinizers' block pool

`tag_seeds` lets you add all the blocks from a tag into the pollinizers' block pool
